title: tool_result 的三种 content 格式

body.fact: tool_result 的 content 字段支持三种格式：(1) 纯字符串，如 "content": "15 degrees"；(2) 嵌套内容块数组，如 [{"type": "text", "text": "15 degrees"}]，支持 text、image、document 类型；(3) document 块数组，如 [{"type": "document", "source": {"type": "text", "media_type": "text/plain", "data": "15 degrees"}}]。
body.context: 简单场景用字符串即可。需要返回图片或多种类型混合结果时，用嵌套内容块。document 块适用于需要指定 media_type 的结构化文档数据。

body_en.fact: The tool_result content field supports three formats: (1) plain string, e.g., "content": "15 degrees"; (2) nested content block array, e.g., [{"type": "text", "text": "15 degrees"}], supporting text, image, and document types; (3) document block array with explicit media_type specification.
body_en.context: Use a plain string for simple cases. Use nested content blocks when returning images or mixed-type results. Document blocks are for structured data where media_type matters.
